items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The Simpsons?
items.explanation: Homer Simpson is one of the defining characters in The Simpsons.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Rhaenyra Targaryen.
items.explanation: Rhaenyra Targaryen is strongly linked to House of the Dragon.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Dexter Morgan.
items.explanation: Dexter Morgan is strongly linked to Dexter.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The Bear?
items.explanation: Carmy Berzatto is one of the defining characters in The Bear.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Greys Anatomy?
items.explanation: Meredith Grey is one of the defining characters in Greys Anatomy.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Prison Break?
items.explanation: Michael Scofield is one of the defining characters in Prison Break.

items.q: The character Jonas Kahnwald appears in Dark.
items.explanation: Jonas Kahnwald is a key character in Dark.

items.q: Which tv show features the character The Doctor?
items.explanation: The Doctor is associated with Doctor Who.

items.q: The character Vi appears in Brooklyn Nine-Nine.
items.explanation: Vi appears in Arcane, not Brooklyn Nine-Nine.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Jake Peralta.
items.explanation: Jake Peralta is strongly linked to Brooklyn Nine-Nine.
